title: Admissions
description: Manage enquiries, applications, and admission pipeline.
accessDenied: You do not have permission to view admissions.

enquiries.title: Admission Enquiries
enquiries.description: Track every prospect from first contact through application.

empty.noDataDescription: Create your first admission enquiry to start the pipeline.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try clearing filters or widening the date range.

newForm.title: New Enquiry
newForm.description: Capture prospect details for the admission pipeline.

errors.parentPhoneInvalid: Enter a 10-digit Indian mobile starting with 6-9
errors.generic: Could not create enquiry. Please try again.
errors.duplicate: An enquiry with this phone and class already exists.

newForm.duplicateWarning: A similar enquiry already exists for this parent phone and class.

fieldHelp.sourceBody: How this prospect first heard about your institute. Used for marketing attribution — the admissions dashboard reports which channels convert best so you can invest in what actually works. Always pick a specific option over 'Other' when possible.
fieldHelp.sourceOptions: Walk-in — visited the campus in person. Phone — called the admissions desk. Referral — referred by a current parent, staff member, or alumnus (fill the 'Referred by' field too). Digital ad — Google, Meta, or YouTube ad. Website — enquired via your institute's website. Social media — came through an organic Instagram, Facebook, or WhatsApp post. Event — admissions fair, school expo, or community event.
fieldHelp.followUpDateBody: When the admissions counsellor should contact this family next. The enquiry will appear on the counsellor's follow-up list on this date, and an SMS/WhatsApp reminder will be queued. Leave blank if the prospect asked you not to call back.

convertDialog.title: Convert to application
convertDialog.description: Choose the standard and academic year for this application.
convertDialog.error: Could not convert enquiry. Please try again.

fieldHelp.academicYearBody: The session the applicant is applying for (April through March). Pick the session the student would actually start attending — for admissions taking place in Jan–March for the next session, choose the next year, not the current one.
fieldHelp.academicYearExample: Example: converting an enquiry in February 2026 for a student starting in April 2026 means selecting 2026–27, not 2025–26.

applications.title: Admission Applications
applications.description: Track applications through the admission pipeline.

empty.noDataDescription: Applications appear here once enquiries are converted or created directly.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try clearing filters or broadening the search.

approveDialog.title: Approve & enrol applicant
approveDialog.description: This will trigger the enrolment workflow. You cannot undo this action.

rejectDialog.title: Reject application
rejectDialog.description: Share a reason so the applicant knows the outcome.

statusDialog.title: Change status
statusDialog.description: Only valid next states are shown.
statusDialog.noTransitions: This application is in a terminal state.

statistics.title: Admission Statistics
statistics.description: Funnel performance, source attribution, and conversion rates.
statistics.funnelDescription: Applicant count at each stage of the pipeline.
statistics.empty: No data yet. Statistics appear once enquiries and applications are created.
